prompt:
A 3D-printed filament spool holder on a workbench: a sturdy printed base with two upright arms cradling a generic filament spool on a smooth axle. The spool is shown feeding filament toward an off-frame printer direction, with the filament strand gently tensioned and aligned, clearly communicating smoother feeding and reduced drag.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image in a clean near-future maker workshop aesthetic: soft cinematic lighting, realistic print layer lines, no brand logos, and no readable text. Keep the holder and spool centered with a simple background so it reads instantly as a spool-holder accessory.
